markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and new GrowthX team structure.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New GrowthX Team:** Jo Kaminska is the new Engagement Manager (strategy/analytics); Mariana Montezzana is the Senior Managing Editor (production/editing).](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:** Create broad content clusters (e.g., "adult-only tours") to funnel traffic to specific tour pages, expanding beyond direct tour keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)
  - [**Top Priority:** Boost sales for the underperforming Dolphin tours via a new content campaign linking them to the popular Whale Watching season.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [**Key Initiative:** Scale the successful Marieta Islands travel guide model by automating its creation, moving from a manual, one-off build to a repeatable process.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Topics

### Team & Workflow Updates

  - [**GrowthX Team Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [**Jo Kaminska:** Engagement Manager → Strategy, analytics, topic selection.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [**Mariana Montezzana:** Senior Managing Editor → End-to-end content production and editing.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [**Content Feedback Loop:**](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
      - [Mariana will convert recurring client feedback (e.g., tour sequence errors) into formal guidelines to streamline the workflow and prevent repeated issues.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [**AI Content Direction:**](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
      - [**Principle:** Human oversight is critical for AI content.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
      - [**Rationale:** AI can misinterpret intent, as seen when it turned a niche keyword ("AI call system QA") into a generic topic ("QA framework").](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
      - [**Action:** Provide detailed briefs with H2/H3 structures and semantically related keywords to ensure accuracy and capture user intent.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)

### Content Strategy & Priorities

  - [**Primary Goal:** Expand content scope to capture broader search traffic and funnel it to specific tours.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)
      - [**Method:** Create high-level content clusters (e.g., "adult-only tours," "cultural series") that link to relevant tour pages.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)
  - [**Dolphin Tour Campaign:**](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [**Problem:** Significant sales drop for Dolphin tours in Cabo and Vallarta.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [**Solution:** Launch a content campaign linking Dolphin programs to the popular Whale Watching season.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
      - [**Support:** Lorena will provide content on the "saving sea lions" campaign to create a positive narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**New Tour Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Cabo:** New "catastrophe" boat tours and a Whale Watching/Dolphin combo.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
      - [**Cancun:** No new tours; focus on refreshing existing content.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
          - [**Update:** Re-add the detail about climbing the Coba pyramid, as it is a key highlight for visitors.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [**"Shibauba" Keyword Article Approved:**](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
      - [**Decision:** Publish the article targeting the high-volume keyword "Shibauba" (\~9k monthly searches).](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The former competitor park is closed, creating an opportunity to own the term by framing it around the local legend of the "magic rain."](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)

### Performance & Scaling Initiatives

  - [**2025 Performance Review:**](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
      - [**Organic Channel:** Strong growth; now drives 60–62% of revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
      - [**Overall Revenue:** Projected -10% e-commerce revenue, primarily due to underperforming paid media.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [**Crunch Dashboard Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Goal:** Improve AI visibility tracking for more granular, location-specific data.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Action:** Reset the dashboard to tag prompts by location (Cabo, Vallarta, Cancun) and funnel stage (Awareness, Evaluation).](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Marieta Islands Landing Page:**](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
      - [**Success:** The manually built travel guide for Marieta Islands is performing well.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
      - [**Challenge:** The manual build process is not scalable.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
      - [**Goal:** Automate the creation of similar travel guides for other destinations to replicate this success efficiently.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [**Social Media Support:**](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
      - [**Request:** Help identifying blog posts suitable for social media repurposing (Reels, Stories).](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
      - [**GrowthX Offer:** Provide content suggestions for the client's team to execute.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Lorena:** Share "saving sea lions" campaign materials for the Dolphin content initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Mariana:** Share the "tours by month" sheet to inform seasonal content planning.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Reset the Crunch Dashboard with location and funnel-stage tags.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Provide suggestions for repurposing blog content for social media.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
      - [Update the content pipeline to correct the "Parasailing Cabo" topic.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
      - [Plan the Dolphin content campaign using provided materials.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [Explore solutions to automate the Marieta Islands travel guide model.](https://fathom.video/share/bfFjAtFqsrTwjynkcHtmMYp-s83sNsNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
